base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_flute_recorder — a pickup_item from 1986 legend of zelda. Flute (Recorder) — teleports to any cleared dungeon entrance. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Flute (Recorder) — teleports to any cleared dungeon entrance; also shrinks Digdogger boss
